query:
-- Backfill sessionsPlayed: count distinct completed sessions each player participated in
UPDATE player_stats ps
JOIN (
  SELECT sp.playerId, COUNT(DISTINCT sp.sessionId) AS sessionsPlayed
  FROM session_players sp
  JOIN sessions s ON s.id = sp.sessionId
  WHERE s.status = 'completed'
  GROUP BY sp.playerId
) computed ON ps.playerId = computed.playerId
SET ps.sessionsPlayed = computed.sessionsPlayed;

-- Backfill sessionsWon: count sessions where player had the highest totalScore
UPDATE player_stats ps
JOIN (
  SELECT sp.playerId, COUNT(*) AS sessionsWon
  FROM session_players sp
  JOIN sessions s ON s.id = sp.sessionId
  WHERE s.status = 'completed'
    AND sp.totalScore = (
      SELECT MAX(sp2.totalScore)
      FROM session_players sp2
      WHERE sp2.sessionId = sp.sessionId
    )
  GROUP BY sp.playerId
) computed ON ps.playerId = computed.playerId
SET ps.sessionsWon = computed.sessionsWon;
